title: grove init --as mcp-llm — target, harness steering (CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md), .mcp.json
description: Add Target::McpLlm (--as mcp-llm) to cli/src/init.rs: run provision_project (grammars + lock), launch the T05 TUI to produce .grove/explore.json, write .mcp.json registering grove serve in explore mode, and write idempotent steering sections to CLAUDE.md AND AGENTS.md (sentinel-block pattern) routing exploration through __explore. Existing --as mcp|skill|both|grammars behavior unchanged (existing init tests pass). --dry-run supported.
